title: eragrostis pilosa subsp. imberbis
intro: Eragrostis pilosa subsp. imberbis, also known as the hairy love grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant has been found to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis pilosa subsp. imberbis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and relieving digestive issues. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and usage may vary due to limited research and traditional use.
